response.original_title: 寝取らせ串刺し輪姦 愛する妻を深奥まで犯し尽くして下さい―。 市来まひろ
response.overview: I couldn't say it for so long. I had been living with it in my heart all this time. My desire to have my beloved wife, Mahiro, the most beautiful and pretty woman in the world, gang-raped by strangers... But I couldn't continue our married life with this thought. That's why I confessed my desire to have her cheated on to her and offered Mahiro to a group of middle-aged men. My beloved wife surrounded by men, her mouth and vagina being fucked... It was an extraordinary sight, like being "impaled," and I felt an abnormal excitement.
response.title: Cuckold Skewer Gangbang: Please Violate My Beloved Wife To The Depths - Ichiki Mahiro
